login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please sign in to your account.
login.passkeyNotSupported: Passkey will be supported in the next version

registered.title: Registration successful! 🎉
registered.message: You can now log in with your new account.

register.title: Create Account
register.step1Subtitle: Link your Discord and Steam accounts to get started

step1.title: Link Accounts
step1.subtitle: Verify Discord and Steam to continue
step1.verifyBeforeContinue: Please verify your information before continuing

step2.title: Account Information
step2.subtitle: Complete your information to create your account
step2.marketingOptIn: Receive emails about updates and events

step3.title: Add Passkey?
step3.subtitle: Passkey allows you to sign in with fingerprint, Face ID, or security key without a password.
step3.unsupported: Your browser does not support Passkey

validation.tosRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service

errors.linkError: An error occurred while linking account
errors.steam_already_linked: This Steam account is already linked to another account
errors.discord_already_linked: This Discord account is already linked to another account
errors.passkeyAlreadyRegistered: This Passkey has already been registered
errors.passkeyUnsupported: Your device does not support creating Passkey. Try a different device.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Verify your identity via Discord to reset your password.

steps.step1Desc: Sign in with Discord to verify your identity.
steps.step2Desc: We'll send a password reset link to your email.
steps.step3Desc: Enter your new password and sign in.

emailSent.title: Email sent!
emailSent.description: We've sent a password reset link to your email.
emailSent.hint: Check your spam folder if you don't see the email. The link expires in 10 minutes.

resend.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

errors.notFound: No account found linked to this Discord.
errors.emailFailed: Failed to send email. Please try again later.
errors.config: System configuration error. Please contact admin.
errors.discordError: Error verifying Discord. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid.

success.title: Password reset successful!
success.description: Your password has been updated. Please sign in again.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

emailVerification.dialogDescription: We've sent a verification email to {email}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link. If you didn't receive it, you can resend.
emailVerification.bannerText: Please verify your email {email}. Some features may be limited until verified.
